zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Piers Butler於1467年4月出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼高萊安時，他的父親James Butler30歲，母親Lady Sabh Kavanagh27歲。他於1486年與Lady Margaret FitzGerald在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1539年8月26日在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼享年72歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Piers Butler于1467年4月出生在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼高萊安时，他的父亲James Butler30岁，母亲Lady Sabh Kavanagh27岁。他于1486年与Lady Margaret FitzGerald在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1539年8月26日在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼享年72岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼。

nameMeanings.name: Butler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a word that originally denoted a wine steward, usually the chief servant of a medieval household, from Norman French butuiller (Old French bouteillier, Latin buticularius, from buticula ‘bottle’). In the large households of royalty and the most powerful nobility, the title came to denote an officer of high rank and responsibility, only nominally concerned with the supply of wine, if at all. As well as being widespread in England, this is also the surname of an important Irish family, descended from Theobald FitzWalter, who was appointed Chief Butler of Ireland by King Henry II in 1177. It is Gaelicized as de Buitléir.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English boteler ‘maker of bottles (usually of leather)’, a derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bo(u)teille ‘bottle’ and synonymous with Botelmaker.
Americanized form of French   Bouthillier   (see   Bouteiller  ).

variants.name: Buttler
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Butler  .
German: occupational name for a village tavern owner, from French bouteillier ‘butler’.
Americanized form of German Buttlar: habitational name from a place so named in Thuringia.

variants.name: Bouthillier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Jacques, Normand, Philippe, Yves.
French: variant of   Bouteiller  . This name is sometimes Americanized as   Butler  . Compare   Boutilier  .

nameMeanings.name: Piers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Regular medieval vernacular form of Peter (from the Old French nominative case, as against the oblique Pier, modern Pierre). In the form Pierce it survived into the 18th century, although in part this may be a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name. Piers was revived in the mid-20th century, perhaps partly under the influence of William Langland's great rambling medieval poem Piers Plowman ( 1367–86 ), in which the character of Piers symbolizes the virtues of hard work, honesty, and fairness.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Piers Butler was born in April 1467, in Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland, his father, James Butler, was 30 and his mother, Lady Sabh Kavanagh, was 27. He married Lady Margaret FitzGerald in 1486, in County Kilkenny, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 26 August 1539, in County Kilkenny, Ireland, at the age of 72, and was buried in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Piers Butler est né en avril 1467, à Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande, son père, James Butler, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Sabh Kavanagh, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret FitzGerald en 1486, à County Kilkenny, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 26 août 1539, à County Kilkenny, Irlande, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Piers Butler im April 1467 in Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Butler 30 und seine Mutter Lady Sabh Kavanagh 27. Er hat 1486 in County Kilkenny, Irland Lady Margaret FitzGerald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 26. August 1539 im Alter von 72 Jahren in County Kilkenny, Irland und wurde in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Piers Butler è nato il nel aprile 1467 nel Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, il suo padre, James Butler, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Sabh Kavanagh, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret FitzGerald nel 1486, nel County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 26 agosto 1539, nel County Kilkenny, Irlanda, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Piers Butlerが1467年4月にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーゴウランで生まれた時，父James Butlerは30歳，母Lady Sabh Kavanaghは27歳であった。1486年にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーでLady Margaret FitzGeraldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1539年8月26日にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーで72歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Piers Butler(이)가 1467년 4월 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이 가란에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Butler(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Sabh Kavanagh(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1486년 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이에서 Lady Margaret FitzGerald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1539년 8월 26일 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이에 묻혔다.

mn.April 1467–26 August 1539: 1467 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сар–1539 оны Наймдугаар сарын 26

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Piers Butler nasceu em abril de 1467, em Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, seu pai, James Butler, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Sabh Kavanagh, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret FitzGerald em 1486, em County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de agosto de 1539, em County Kilkenny, Irlanda, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Piers Butler родился апрель 1467 г. в местности гоуран, килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия, его отцу по имени James Butler было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Sabh Kavanagh, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret FitzGerald в 1486 г. в местности коунти килкенни, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 26 августа 1539 г. в местности коунти килкенни, Ирландия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Piers Butler nació en abril de 1467, en Gowran, Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, su papá, James Butler, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Sabh Kavanagh, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret FitzGerald en 1486, en County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 26 de agosto de 1539, en County Kilkenny, Irlanda, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.
